Name: High Performance Power Plan
Description: Switch to High Performance power plan for maximum CPU speed

Name: Disable SysMain (Superfetch)
Description: Stops Superfetch service. Improves performance on SSDs.

Name: Disable Windows Search Indexing
Description: Reduces disk I/O by stopping file indexing. Search still works.

Name: Reduce Visual Animations
Description: Disables fade, slide and shadow effects for snappier UI

Name: Disable Hibernation
Description: Frees up disk space (equal to RAM size) by removing hiberfil.sys

Name: GameMode & GPU Scheduling
Description: Enables Windows GameMode and Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling

Name: Disable Telemetry
Description: Sets data collection to minimum (Security level). Stops DiagTrack.

Name: Disable Advertising ID
Description: Prevents apps from using your advertising ID for personalized ads

Name: Disable Activity History
Description: Stops Windows from recording app usage and activity timeline

Name: Disable Location Services
Description: Blocks apps from accessing your device location

Name: Disable Webcam Access
Description: Blocks all apps from accessing the webcam

Name: Disable Microphone Access
Description: Blocks all apps from accessing the microphone

Name: Block Telemetry Hosts
Description: Adds Microsoft telemetry domains to HOSTS file (blocks at network level)

Name: Enable Dark Mode
Description: Switches Windows and apps to dark theme

Name: Show File Extensions
Description: Shows file extensions in Explorer (e.g. .exe, .txt, .jpg)

Name: Show Hidden Files
Description: Reveals hidden files and folders in Explorer

Name: Remove Start Menu Ads
Description: Disables sponsored apps and ads in the Start menu

Name: Clean Taskbar
Description: Removes Task View, News, Widgets and Cortana from taskbar

Name: Disable Bing Search in Start
Description: Stops Start menu from sending searches to Bing

Name: Remove Microsoft Bloatware
Description: Uninstalls 30+ pre-installed Microsoft apps (News, Weather, Skype...)

Name: Remove Xbox Components
Description: Removes Xbox app, Game Bar, Game Overlay (keep if you game on Xbox)

Name: Disable Edge Bloat
Description: Disables Edge startup boost, shopping assistant and Bing suggestions

Name: Disable OneDrive Startup
Description: Prevents OneDrive from launching at startup

Name: Disable Consumer Features
Description: Prevents Windows from auto-installing games and third-party apps from the Store via CloudContent policies.

Name: Disable Xbox Game DVR
Description: Disables Xbox Game DVR and Game Bar background recording. Frees CPU/GPU overhead for non-gamers.

Name: Delete Temporary Files
Description: Erases all files from %TEMP% and C:\Windows\Temp to recover disk space.

Name: Run Disk Cleanup
Description: Runs Disk Cleanup on C: (VERYLOWDISK) and DISM StartComponentCleanup to remove superseded Windows Updates.

Name: Disable Explorer Auto-Discovery
Description: Stops Explorer from auto-detecting folder types based on contents, eliminating the Bags/BagMRU slowdown.

Name: Enable End Task on Taskbar
Description: Adds End Task to the right-click menu when clicking a program in the Taskbar (TaskbarDeveloperSettings).

Name: Disable Location Tracking (HKLM)
Description: System-wide location policy disable via HKLM — covers sensor, lfsvc service, and Maps AutoUpdate.

Name: Disable PowerShell 7 Telemetry
Description: Sets the machine-wide POWERSHELL_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 environment variable to opt out of PS7 data collection.

Name: Create Restore Point
Description: Creates a System Restore Point so all WinTooler changes can be reverted via System Restore.

Name: Revert Start Menu Layout
Description: Reverts the Start Menu to classic layout before the Windows 11 25H2 gradual rollout using ViVeTool.

Name: Set Services to Manual
Description: Sets 80+ non-critical system services to Manual startup. Services start on-demand when needed.

Name: Disable WPBT (Security)
Description: Disables Windows Platform Binary Table — prevents PC vendors executing code at boot without user consent.

Name: Remove Widgets
Description: Removes the Widgets icon from the Taskbar and uninstalls the WidgetsPlatformRuntime AppX package.

Name: Disable Store Search in Start
Description: Blocks Windows Store recommended apps from appearing in Start Menu search results.

Name: Brave Debloat
Description: Disables Brave Rewards, Leo AI, Crypto Wallet, VPN and stats ping via machine-level policy registry keys.

Name: Edge Debloat (Full)
Description: Full Edge policy debloat: 16 settings covering telemetry, popups, rewards, shopping assistant, and Wallet.

Name: Remove Microsoft Edge
Description: Unblocks the Edge uninstaller restriction then removes Edge entirely. Requires administrator.

Name: Set Time to UTC (Dual Boot)
Description: Sets the hardware clock to UTC so Windows and Linux agree on time when dual-booting.

Name: Remove OneDrive (Full)
Description: Runs the OneDrive uninstaller, removes registry run keys, applies policy, and deletes leftover folders.

Name: Remove Home from Explorer
Description: Removes the Home section from Explorer navigation pane and sets This PC as the default open location.

Name: Remove Gallery from Explorer
Description: Removes the Gallery section from Explorer navigation pane and sets This PC as default.

Name: Set Display for Performance
Description: Disables window animations, drag-full-windows, DWM Aero Peek and other visual effects for max speed.

Name: Remove ALL Store Apps
Description: ⚠️ Removes ALL Microsoft Store applications including system components. Use with extreme caution.

Name: Disable Background Apps
Description: Sets GlobalUserDisabled=1 to stop all Microsoft Store apps from running in the background.

Name: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations
Description: Disables FSO globally via GameDVR_DXGIHonorFSEWindowsCompatible. Also disables Color Management in Exclusive FS.

Name: Disable IPv6
Description: Sets DisabledComponents=255 and calls Disable-NetAdapterBinding to disable IPv6 on all adapters.

Name: Disable Notifications
Description: Disables the entire Notification Tray and Calendar via Explorer policy and PushNotifications registry.

Name: Block Adobe Network
Description: Adds 15 Adobe activation and telemetry server entries to the hosts file as 0.0.0.0 blocks.

Name: Prefer IPv4 over IPv6
Description: Sets DisabledComponents=32 (Prefer IPv4) without fully disabling IPv6 — reduces latency on most networks.

Name: Block Razer Software Installs
Description: Blocks Razer co-installers by disabling SearchOrderConfig and locking the Razer installer folder.

Name: Disable Microsoft Copilot
Description: Disables Copilot via machine+user policy, removes the taskbar button, and uninstalls the Copilot AppX.

Name: Set Classic Right-Click Menu
Description: Restores the Windows 10 context menu style in Explorer by registering a blank InprocServer32 CLSID.

Name: Disable Storage Sense
Description: Prevents Storage Sense from automatically deleting temporary files and clearing the Downloads folder.

Name: Disable Teredo
Description: Disables IPv6 Teredo tunneling with netsh and registry. Can reduce latency but may break some applications.

Name: Disable Xbox & Gaming Components
Description: Removes Xbox AppX packages (Identity, Overlay, GamingOverlay, TCUI) and disables Xbox services.
